title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das of Yutori argues that most AI agents fail in practice because errors compound rapidly across multi-step workflows, with the agent industry having normalized this unreliability. He emphasizes that reliability matters more than raw performance, and that building taste through practices like dogfooding is critical to shipping agents that work consistently.
